Shri Gobinda Chandra Roy

3 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.

by Shri Gobinda Chandra Roy
Eastern India, Bengal, Kolkata, Kalighat · c. 1890 · Woodcut, hand colored with gum tempera
Rama and Sita in the royal palace (recto), from a Kalighat album
by Shri Gobinda Chandra Roy
Eastern India, Bengal, Kolkata, Kalighat · c. 1890 · Woodcut, hand colored with gum tempera

by Shri Gobinda Chandra Roy
